LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Boons.Compat_VREAn: Start with extra Basic Androids from Vanilla Races Expanded - Android (alongside your other colonists). You also start with Neutroamine Logistics and Androidtech research.

Androids boon: unable to add extra Androids to colonist preparation screen. This scenario/origin's colonist preparation screen does not support adding specific xenotypes (such as The Anomaly, due to its Ghoul requirements).
Please deselect the Androids boon or select a different Origin. (Sorry!)
